testcase.name: test_register_new_member
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_settings.py:102: in test_register_new_member assert data["user"]["email"] == email E AssertionError: assert 'test_8ebaed2...right-llm.dev' == 'TEST_8ebaed2...right-llm.dev' E E - TEST_8ebaed2ffd@right-llm.dev E ? ^^^^ E + test_8ebaed2ffd@right-llm.dev E ? ^^^^

testcase.name: test_brute_force_lockout_after_5_fails
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_settings.py:242: in test_brute_force_lockout_after_5_fails assert last.status_code == 429, f"Expected 429 after 5 fails, got {last.status_code}: {last.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 429 after 5 fails, got 401: {"detail":"Invalid email or password"} E assert 401 == 429 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_gateway_chat_rate_limit_429

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected at least one 429 within 75 requests assert False

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_auth_settings.py:261: in test_gateway_chat_rate_limit_429 assert saw_429, "Expected at least one 429 within 75 requests" E AssertionError: Expected at least one 429 within 75 requests E assert False
